_help: Edit this file to control what syncs to your Google Sheet. See the 'Configuration' section of the README for a full walkthrough. After editing, redeploy.
_help_field_mappings: LEFT = the exact field name as it appears in Frame.io metadata. RIGHT = the column header in your Google Sheet where that value goes. Add a line per field. Matching ignores case and spaces.
_help_columns: Which sheet columns hold the File ID (used to find the right row), the asset filename, and the status. file_id_column is required.
_help_removal: A row is deleted (instead of updated) only when its status changes TO one of removal_statuses AND its current status is one of deletable_prior_statuses. Leave removal_statuses empty ([]) to never auto-delete.
